---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

Describe the pain point or workflow gap. Real example > abstract description.

## Proposed solution

What would the ideal behavior look like? CLI flag? new section in reports? new MCP tool?

## Alternatives considered

What else have you tried or thought about?

## Who else benefits?

(MSPs / single SMB / auditor / specific compliance framework / etc.)

## Additional context

Mockups, links to similar tools, prior art, etc.
